SEARCH
Package project2_root.models

Class OrderPageModel

java.lang.Object
project2_root.models.OrderPageModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Model
public class OrderPageModel extends Object implements Model
Model class for managing the order page logic.

This class stages OrderItem objects in memory before committing them to the database. It interacts with the POSDatabase to retrieve menu items, compute costs, create orders, and finalize them.

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • OrderPageModel

      public OrderPageModel(POSDatabase database)
      Constructs a new OrderPageModel using the provided database interface.
      Parameters:
      database - the POS database used for retrieving menu items and writing orders

  • Method Details

    • getMenuItems

      public Collection<MenuItem> getMenuItems()
      Retrieves all menu items from the database.
      Returns:
      a collection of available MenuItem objects

    • createOrderIfNeeded

      public void createOrderIfNeeded(int employeeId)
      Ensures an order exists for the current session.

      This method is intentionally empty because order creation is deferred until completeCurrentOrder(int) is called.

      Parameters:
      employeeId - the ID of the employee creating the order

    • addItemToOrder

      public void addItemToOrder(int itemId, int quantity, int sweetness, int ice, int boba, int mangoJelly, int aloeJelly)
      Stages a new OrderItem with the given customization parameters. The item is not written to the database until the order is completed.
      Parameters:
      itemId - the ID of the menu item
      quantity - number of units ordered
      sweetness - sweetness level (0–100)
      ice - ice level (0–100)
      boba - whether boba is included (1 = yes, 0 = no)
      mangoJelly - whether mango jelly is included (1 = yes, 0 = no)
      aloeJelly - whether aloe jelly is included (1 = yes, 0 = no)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the menu item does not exist

    • getCurrentOrderItems

      public Collection<OrderItem> getCurrentOrderItems()
      Returns the currently staged (not yet committed) order items.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable collection of staged OrderItem objects

    • getCurrentOrderId

      public int getCurrentOrderId()
      Returns the ID of the active order, or -1 if no order is active.
      Returns:
      the current order ID or -1

    • removeOrderItem

      public void removeOrderItem(int index)
      Removes a staged order item by index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the item to remove

    • getOrderItems

      public Collection<OrderItem> getOrderItems(int orderId)
      Retrieves all order items for a completed order.
      Parameters:
      orderId - the ID of the order
      Returns:
      a collection of OrderItem objects from the database

    • completeCurrentOrder

      public void completeCurrentOrder(int employeeId)
      Finalizes the current order by:
      1. Creating a new order in the database
      2. Inserting all staged items
      3. Decrementing ingredient quantities
      4. Marking the order as complete
      5. Clearing staged items
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee completing the order
